instruction: Two subtle issues on the clock icon: the yellow highlight ring is the wrong shade (off-white) AND it has drifted slightly (~3px). Restore it precisely.
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/clock.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="#fafafa" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="61" r="56" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/clock.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"/><polyline points="12 6 12 12 16 14"/></g>
  <circle id="halo" fill="none" stroke="#fde047" stroke-width="2" cx="64" cy="64" r="56" />
</svg>
